action.reasoning: Observation: iter 11 command failed with RuntimeError: attn_mask shape [29,29] should be (8,8). Analysis: mask computed from tgt length 29, but self-attention received query length 8, indicating a mismatch in how the mask was generated relative to the actual target passed (likely a test forward). Decision: fix by computing tgt_mask inside model.forward (auto-mask generation) to guarantee consistency, remove any pre-training test forward, adjust encoder to pool_grid=(8,32) for manageable sequence length 256, and add label smoothing, AMP, warmup+cosine schedule, and gradient clipping. Train for 30 epochs with DenseNet stride-4 encoder and 6-layer decoder, then submit eval.
